name: János Starker
abstract: János Starker (; Hungarian: [ˈʃtɒrkɛr]; July 5, 1924 – April 28, 2013) was a Hungarian-American cellist. From 1958 until his death, he taught at the Indiana University Jacobs School of Music, where he held the title of Distinguished Professor.

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: The second record I did for Laurel Record was Starker Plays Baker. It was a piece for Janos – it was an album that featured Janos Starker, on one side with my cello sonata
about_quotes.doc_title: David N. Baker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
